all.en: Welcome everyone to the quarterly content calendar planning meeting today.
all.zh: 歡迎大家參加今日的季度內容行事曆規劃會議。

all.en: Our goal is to align on themes, channels, and publishing cadence for next quarter.
all.zh: 目標是就下一季的主題、通路與發布頻率達成共識。

all.en: We will begin with a quick review of performance from the previous quarter.
all.zh: 首先快速檢視上一季的成效表現。

all.en: Blog traffic grew by twenty two percent compared with the same period last year.
all.zh: 部落格流量較去年同期成長百分之二十二。

all.en: Video content delivered the strongest engagement rates across social platforms.
all.zh: 影音內容在社群平台上創下最強的互動率表現。

all.en: Email open rates remained stable while click through rates declined slightly.
all.zh: 電子報開信率維持穩定，點擊率則略為下降。

all.en: Based on these signals, we plan to invest more in short form video next quarter.
all.zh: 依據這些訊號，下一季我們計畫加強短影音的投入。

all.en: Three core themes are proposed to guide editorial planning during this period.
all.zh: 建議以三大核心主題引導此期間的編輯規劃。

all.en: The first theme highlights customer success stories across diverse industries.
all.zh: 第一個主題聚焦於不同產業的客戶成功故事。

all.en: The second theme explores practical guides for emerging workplace technologies.
all.zh: 第二個主題探討新興職場科技的實用指南。

all.en: The third theme addresses sustainability practices that resonate with our audience.
all.zh: 第三個主題探討能引起受眾共鳴的永續實務作法。

all.en: Each theme will receive a dedicated landing hub and a measurable channel mix.
all.zh: 每個主題將擁有專屬主題頁與可衡量的通路組合。

all.en: Publishing cadence will include two long articles and three short posts each week.
all.zh: 發布頻率將包含每週兩篇長文與三則短文。

all.en: We will also distribute one podcast episode and one newsletter every Friday.
all.zh: 另將於每週五發布一集 podcast 與一份電子報。

all.en: Social posts will follow a fixed rhythm with platform specific creative formats.
all.zh: 社群貼文將依固定節奏，採用各平台專屬的創意格式。

all.en: Creative briefs will be circulated two weeks before each publishing window opens.
all.zh: 創意需求書將於每個發布檔期開放前兩週發送。

all.en: Subject matter experts should confirm availability for interviews by Friday this week.
all.zh: 主題專家請於本週五前確認受訪時段。

all.en: Translation needs into Japanese and Spanish should be flagged early in the cycle.
all.zh: 如需日語與西班牙語翻譯，請於週期初期即提出註記。

all.en: Compliance review will continue for any content related to regulated industries.
all.zh: 涉及受規管產業的內容仍須進行法遵審查。

all.en: Performance reviews will be held monthly to identify learnings and next actions.
all.zh: 每月將舉辦成效檢討，找出學習要點與後續行動。

all.en: Please review the shared planning document and add comments by Wednesday.
all.zh: 請檢視共享的規劃文件，並於週三前加入意見。

all.en: We appreciate everyone bringing fresh ideas and energy to this collaborative effort.
all.zh: 感謝大家為這項合作投入新鮮的點子與活力。

all.en: Editorial roles and responsibilities will be confirmed in the planning document.
all.zh: 編輯角色與職責將於規劃文件中正式確認。

all.en: Budget for guest writers has been increased by fifteen percent this quarter.
all.zh: 本季客座作者的預算已調升百分之十五。

all.en: Design support will be allocated based on each theme priority and timing.
all.zh: 設計支援將依各主題的優先順序與時程進行分配。

all.en: We will pilot a new approval workflow to shorten review cycles.
all.zh: 我們將試行新版審核流程以縮短審查週期。

all.en: SEO will continue to feed monthly keyword opportunities into the calendar.
all.zh: SEO 團隊將持續每月將關鍵字機會輸入行事曆。

all.en: Analytics will share an updated dashboard at next month team meeting.
all.zh: 分析團隊將於下個月團隊會議分享最新版儀表板。

all.en: Cross promotion with the partnerships team is encouraged where it adds value.
all.zh: 在能創造價值之處鼓勵與合作夥伴團隊進行交叉推廣。

all.en: Please raise any resource conflicts as soon as they become apparent to you.
all.zh: 一旦察覺任何資源衝突，請儘速提出反映。

all.en: Today minutes and action items will be sent out before end of business.
all.zh: 今日會議記錄與行動項目將於下班前發送。

all.en: Thank you and let us aim for our most impactful quarter to date together.
all.zh: 感謝大家，讓我們一起朝向至今最具影響力的一季邁進。
